PreInvocation.command: repo="$(jj root 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && bash "$repo/.agents/skills/vcs/scripts/antigravity-hook.sh" pre-invocation

hooks.command: repo="$(jj root 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && bash "$repo/.agents/skills/vcs/scripts/antigravity-hook.sh" pre-tool-use
